title: TypingPayload/PresencePayload have no spec reference
description: The private structs TypingPayload and PresencePayload in sse.rs have no doc comment or inline comment linking them to the spec wire format. A maintainer reading these structs has no spec anchor to check correctness against. Add a brief comment to each: e.g. '// Wire shape: draft-atwood-jmap-chat-00 §7 "typing" event data.' Without this, a future spec update becomes a grep exercise to find where each field originates.
